case_title: DANNY BOHANON VS. WENJIE LIN ET AL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-06-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-06-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ALLYSYN OVERTON. PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT DANNY BOHANON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS/CROSS-CLAIMANTS WENJIE LIN AND ZAOH RESTAURANT ARE PRESENT, WITH ZAOH RESTAURANT REPRESENTED BY WENJIE LIN (OWNER). WENJI LIN IS ASSISTED BY PROVISIONALLY-CERTIFIED MANDARIN COURT INTERPRETER JEFFREY DINN. DANNY BOHANON WAIVES SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANTS' CROSS-CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ALLYSYN OVERTON; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,598.81 FILED BY BOHANON, DANNY AS TO DEFENDANT LIN, WENJIE ZAOH RESTAURANT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-06-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-06-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ALLYSYN OVERTON. PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT DANNY BOHANON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS/CROSS-CLAIMANTS WENJIE LIN AND ZAOH RESTAURANT ARE PRESENT, WITH ZAOH RESTAURANT REPRESENTED BY WENJIE LIN (OWNER). WENJI LIN IS ASSISTED BY PROVISIONALLY-CERTIFIED MANDARIN COURT INTERPRETER JEFFREY DINN. DANNY BOHANON WAIVES SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANTS' CROSS-CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ALLYSYN OVERTON; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOHANON, DANNY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIN, WENJIE ZAOH RESTAURANT $548.00 PRINCIPAL, $154.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $702.00, DEFENDANTS SHALL PAY JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
